title: lepidagathis keralensis
intro: Lepidagathis keralensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as a herb that belongs to the genus Lepidagathis. The plant has been reported to possess medicinal properties, with studies indicating that it has anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lepidagathis keralensis include its potential to aid in the management of various health conditions, such as fever, inflammation, and infections, as well as its possible role in protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. In traditional medicine, Lepidagathis keralensis is often used to prepare herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are administered to treat various ailments.
